title: Boomer's Better Netherite
description: A Netherite armour + tools texture back that adds diamond highlights
body:
A Netherite armour + tools texture back that adds diamond highlights
I had this on forge for a while and ive added it to modrinth bc its better!
I made this bc i wasnt happy with other netherite packs, so if you want it done right do it yourself.
